# terrible_community_general_scaleway_user_data (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `region` (String) Scaleway compute zone.
- `server_id` (String) Scaleway Compute instance ID of the server.

### Optional

- `user_data` (String) User defined data. Typically used with `cloud-init`. Pass your `cloud-init` script here as a string.
